previousDayImpact: Spain's victory in the final provided a massive 41-point boost to Team Camouflage Cndm, Team Mack, and Metcalf Hurts.
The result created significant separation between those who backed Spain and the rest of the field, who saw no point gains from the final match.
leaderboardSummary: Team Camouflage Cndm climbed to the top of the leaderboard, overtaking Team Jordan.
Team Mack surged 3 places to reach 2nd, while Metcalf Hurts made the biggest move of the day by jumping 4 spots into 6th.
Team Jordan fell 2 places to 3rd as their remaining teams were eliminated.
leverageWatch: The slate has no direct contest implications as there are no matches remaining.
